description_en: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
Paralyzes on contact.
description_es: Puede paralizar al mínimo contacto.

description_en: Prevents self-destruction.
description_es: Evita que un Pokémon pueda autodestruirse.

description_en: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
description_es: Sube la Velocidad cuando hay sol.

description_en: Prevents sleep.
description_es: Evita el quedarse dormido.

description_en: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
description_es: Sube una característica mucho, pero baja otra.

description_en: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.
The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.
description_es: El Pokémon puede ver el objeto que lleva el rival.

description_en: Gradually boosts SPEED.
description_es: Aumenta la Velocidad gradualmente.

description_en: Moves can be used on the target regardless of its Abilities.
description_es: Usa movimientos sin que importen las habilidades del objetivo.

description_en: Prevents confusion.
description_es: Evita ser confundido.

description_en: Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.
description_es: Al ser golpeado, roba el objeto del objetivo.

description_en: Transforms into its Hero Form when switching out.
If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
Ups evasion in a sandstorm.
description_es: Aumenta la Evasión en las tormentas de arena.

description_en: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.
This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.
description_es: Permite envenenar incluso a rivales de tipo Acero o Veneno.

description_en: Eats a consumed berry again at end of next turn.
Prevents priority moves against this Pokémon and allies.
Raises Attack when hit by Grass-type moves.
description_es: Neutraliza los movimientos de tipo Planta y sube el Ataque.

description_en: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
description_es: Sube el Ataque cuando el rival le baja las características.

description_en: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.
Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.
description_es: Hace que los PP del rival se acaben antes.

description_en: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
Halves damage from fire moves and burns.
description_es: Atenúa los movimientos de tipo Fuego.

description_en: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
description_es: Aumenta la Defensa al recibir un ataque físico.

description_en: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
description_es: Evita que el rival pueda debilitarle de un solo golpe.

description_en: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
description_es: Impide que el rival pueda atraer ataques hacia sí mismo por efecto de su habilidad o sus movimientos.

description_en: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.
Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
description_es: Recupera unos pocos PS al cambiar de Pokémon.

description_en: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.
description_es: Protege al Pokémon del robo de objetos.

description_en: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.
description_es: Proporciona inmunidad frente a los ataques de tipo Tierra.

description_en: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.
description_es: Proporciona inmunidad frente a los ataques de tipo Tierra.

description_en: Doubles Speed on Electric Terrain.
description_es: Duplica la Velocidad si hay un campo eléctrico en el terreno de combate.

description_en: The Pokémon makes it snow when it enters a battle.
description_es: El Pokémon invoca una tormenta de granizo.

description_en: Raises evasion in a hailstorm.
description_es: Sube la Evasión durante una tormenta de granizo.

description_en: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.
description_es: A veces, puede atacar el primero.

description_en: Prevents confusion.
description_es: Evita ser confundido.

description_en: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
description_es: Recupera unos pocos PS al cambiar de Pokémon.

description_en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.
description_es: Al entrar en combate, rezuma una substancia medicinal por la caracola que revierte los cambios en las características de los aliados.

description_en: Prevents confusion.

description_en: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.
description_es: Cambia su tipo según el campo que haya en el terreno de combate.

description_en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.
description_es: Baja el Ataque del rival.

description_en: Powers up if hit by fire.
description_es: Potencia movimientos de tipo Fuego si ha sufrido antes alguno.

description_en: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.
description_es: Impide que el Pokémon se dañe con sus movimientos.

description_en: Powers up Fire-type moves when HP is low.
description_es: Potencia los ataques de tipo Fuego en un apuro.

description_en: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.
description_es: El Pokémon puede ver el objeto que lleva el rival.

description_en: Powers up slicing moves.
A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.
description_es: Bloquea los golpes críticos.

description_en: Takes on the appearance of the last party member.
description_es: Se convierte en el último Pokémon del equipo.

description_en: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.
description_es: Baja la Velocidad del Pokémon con el que entra en contacto.

description_en: The Pokémon can hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
description_es: Movimientos tipo Normal y Lucha golpean a Pokémon Fantasma.

description_en: Moves don't make contact.
description_es: Permite usar cualquier movimiento sin entrar en contacto con el rival.

description_en: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.
description_es: Su robusta mandíbula le confiere una potente mordedura.

description_en: The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.
description_es: Recupera algunos PS cuando hay tormentas de granizo.
